query:
SELECT id, username, name, role, status, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE id IN (16020692, 16020693, 16020694, 16020710) 
   OR username IN ('13900000200', '13900000602', '13900000989') 
   OR name LIKE '%测试合伙人%' 
   OR name LIKE '%多城市合伙人%' 
   OR name LIKE '%无城市合伙人%';
